name: high friction event count for a rule produces an action card consumed by the rubric loop's improvement queue
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs && for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do printf '{"event":"inline-suppression","rule_id":"no-eval","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:0%dZ"}\n' "$i" >> .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/cross-loop-emit.sh" --target rubric-action-cards --threshold 5 --since 1d 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs/action-cards.yaml ] && grep -q 'rule_id: no-eval' .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs/action-cards.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
